src/engine/order_types

  • Index
Search:
Group by:
  • Imports
  • Types
    • FleetOrder
    • FleetOrderType
    • StandingOrder

    • StandingOrderType
Source   Edit  

Fleet order types shared between modules Created to avoid circular dependencies between gamestate and orders modules

Imports

../common/types/core, ../common/types/planets

Types

FleetOrder = object
  fleetId*: FleetId
  orderType*: FleetOrderType
  targetSystem*: Option[SystemId]
  targetFleet*: Option[FleetId]
  priority*: int
Persistent fleet order that continues until completed or overridden Source   Edit   
FleetOrderType {.pure.} = enum
  Hold, Move, SeekHome, Patrol, GuardStarbase, GuardPlanet, BlockadePlanet,
  Bombard, Invade, Blitz, Colonize, SpyPlanet, SpySystem, HackStarbase,
  JoinFleet, Rendezvous, Salvage, Reserve, Mothball, Reactivate
Source   Edit   
StandingOrder = object
  fleetId*: FleetId
  orderType*: StandingOrderType
  params*: StandingOrderParams
  roe*: int
  createdTurn*: int
  lastExecutedTurn*: int
  executionCount*: int
  suspended*: bool
Complete standing order specification Stored in GameState.standingOrders: TableFleetId, StandingOrder Source   Edit   
StandingOrderParams = object
  case orderType*: StandingOrderType
  of PatrolRoute:
    patrolSystems*: seq[SystemId]
    patrolIndex*: int
  of DefendSystem, GuardColony:
    defendTargetSystem*: SystemId
    defendMaxRange*: int
  of AutoColonize:
    preferredPlanetClasses*: seq[PlanetClass]
    colonizeMaxRange*: int
  of AutoReinforce:
    reinforceDamageThreshold*: float
    targetFleet*: Option[FleetId]
  of AutoRepair:
    repairDamageThreshold*: float
    targetShipyard*: Option[SystemId]
  of AutoEvade:
    fallbackSystem*: SystemId
    evadeTriggerRatio*: float
  of BlockadeTarget:
    blockadeTargetColony*: SystemId
  else:
    nil
Parameters for standing order execution Different parameters for different order types Source   Edit   
StandingOrderType {.pure.} = enum
  None, PatrolRoute, DefendSystem, AutoColonize, AutoReinforce, AutoRepair,
  AutoEvade, GuardColony, BlockadeTarget
Persistent fleet behaviors that execute when no explicit order given Reduces micromanagement, provides quality-of-life for players and AI See docs/architecture/standing-orders.md for complete design Source   Edit  

Made with Nim. Generated: 1980-01-01 00:00:00 UTC
